added_paragraphs: We’ll start using interactions with AIs to personalize experiences and ads. This update goes into effect on December 16, 2025.
What is the Privacy Policy and what does it cover?
llm_summary: Meta's Privacy Policy now includes a new section stating that starting December 16, 2025, they will use interactions with AIs to personalize user experiences and advertisements. Additionally, a paragraph explaining what the Privacy Policy is and what it covers has been added. No paragraphs were modified or removed in this update.
